column2: Sorting things by size, color, or shape
Talking about money when shopping (e.g. "which costs more?")
Identifying names of written alphabet letters
Doing crafts involving scissors and glue
Putting pegs in a board or shapes into holes, playing with puzzles
Using educational software (eg. Reader Rabbit, Disney Preschool)
Building Lego or construction set (Duplo, Megablocks, etc.)
Having your child wear a watch
Child computer or arithmetic software (eg. playing with 'My first computer' (to practice arithmetic and counting skills), playing Disney preschool)
